data.name: Acumen Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
data.description: Acumen Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, develops targeted therapies for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease. It focuses on advancing a targeted immunotherapy drug candidate, sabirnetug (ACU193), which is in its Phase 2 ALTITUDE-AD clinical trial to target toxic soluble amyloid beta oligomers. data.name: Aegon Ltd.
data.description: Aegon Ltd. provides insurance services in the Americas, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom, and internationally. It offers retirement plans, mutual funds, and unit-linked products; and annuities, life, and health insurance.
